notes: Chunk 43 (Template C, Tier B) complete 2026-06-09. Two batches: (1) 25 new routes: 7 EU-to-UK (Romania/Malta/Cyprus/Finland/Hungary/Bulgaria/Croatia), 6 Mexico outbound, 6 Brazil outbound, 6 Indonesia outbound. (2) 25 existing thin routes overwritten with quality: China outbound (australia, new-zealand, germany, france, singapore, japan, south-korea, spain, italy), Vietnam outbound (canada, germany, france, netherlands, italy, spain), Thailand outbound (canada, germany, france, netherlands), UAE outbound (japan, south-korea, new-zealand), HK outbound (united-states, new-zealand, united-kingdom). Blog Day 13: pet-transport-tenerife-to-uk.md (Marcus Webb). Routes 5506->5531, blog 419->420, pages 6298->6324. Next: Chunk 44 (Template D, Tier B). Blog Day 14 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
